title: Leaf Pile
description: Fallen leaves naturally pile up underneath the leaves.
body:
# Leaf Pile
This Mod adds a new decorative block to Minecraft, the Leaf Pile. 
Over time, corresponding leaf piles will generate nearby fallen leaves.

![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9130c7454946c5ca0e2857180996f9b9020bbc3.png)

## About
- Leaf piles that are not near a water source have a higher chance of drying out.
- Dried leaf piles have a chance of disappearing naturally, but player-placed leaf piles will not disappear spontaneously.
- Destroying a leaf pile with scissors will yield the leaf pile item, otherwise you will only receive leaves or sticks.
